title: Cyber security breaches survey 2025
body: "The government has surveyed UK businesses, charities and educational institutions to find out how they approach cyber security and gain insight into the cyber security issues they face. This official statistic informs government policy on cyber security and how government works with industry to build a prosperous and resilient digital UK.  You can see previous versions of this survey from 2017 - 2024 on the Cyber Security Breaches Survey collection page. "
